name: Celularity Inc
business: Celularity Inc is a cellular and regenerative medicine company developing off-the-shelf allogeneic cellular therapies and advanced biomaterial products derived from the postpartum human placenta. The company also provides biobanking services for umbilical cord blood and placenta-derived cells, and offers contract manufacturing and development services to third parties.
sellsTo: patients requiring soft tissue repair and reconstructive procedures
healthcare providers in surgical and wound care markets

exposures.sentence: We are developing a pipeline of off-the-shelf placental-derived allogeneic cellular therapy product candidates such as, human placental-derived stems cells and MLASCs, including cenplacel-L.

We develop and market commercial-stage, off-the-shelf placental-derived biomaterial products, including allografts and connective tissue matrices for use in soft tissue repair and reconstructive procedures addressing a broad range of degenerative and surgical indications.

We actively pursue revenue-generating opportunities that leverage our core expertise in cellular therapeutic development and manufacturing by providing contract manufacturing and development services to third parties.

catalysts.event: Submit 510(k) notification for Celularity Tendon Wrap (CTW)
catalysts.sentence: Based on the FDA Office of Combination Products, or OCP, preliminary assessment we now intend to submit a 510(k) notification for CTW in the first half of 2025.

catalysts.event: Submit 510(k) notification for Fuse Bone Void Filler
catalysts.sentence: Based on OCP's preliminary assessment, we now intend to submit a 510(k) notification for FUSE in the second half of 2025.
Under the agreement, the Company is entitled to receive aggregate consideration of $35 million, consisting of an initial payment of $15 million due by April 15, 2026.

catalysts.event: NexGel transaction closing and receipt of net proceeds
catalysts.sentence: The Company received net proceeds of $4.8 million from NexGel on the closing date, April 17, 2026.
